ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rf_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RF device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the RF device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the RF device */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line the device belongs to */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date the device was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., in production, tested, shipped) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the device */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware design */,
  "manufacturing_batch" TEXT /* Batch number for manufacturing traceability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_devices_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department responsible for the product line */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the product line was launched */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* Date when the product line will be discontinued */,
  "target_market" TEXT /* Market segment the product line targets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF device the specification belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the parameter */,
  "minimum_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "maximum_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter */,
  "spec_category" TEXT /* Category of the specification */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance level for the parameter */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Importance level of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES rf_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF device being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., functional test, stress test) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Conditions under which the test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES rf_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "procedure_document" TEXT /* Path to the document detailing the test procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF device being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES rf_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spec_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification change */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the parameter */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the change approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spec_history_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES specifications ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF device the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, test report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the document */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number of the document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_documents_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES rf_devices ("device_id")
)
